Transfer.title: Transfer
Transfer.description: Represents a single money transfer transaction made through the AVA FIN application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Transfer entity.

recipientName.description: The full name of the individual or entity receiving the transfer.

recipientAccount.description: The account number of the recipient.

recipientBank.description: The name of the financial institution where the recipient's account is held.

amount.description: The monetary amount of the transfer, specified in MXN.

transferDate.description: The date and time when the transfer was successfully completed.

status.description: The current status of the transfer.

createdByUid.description: The UID of the advisor who created this record.

createdBy.description: The email of the advisor who created this record.

definition.description: Centralized transfers collection with ownership tracking for siloing and superuser access.
